metadata.description: Deploys an Azure Container Instance running a custom PowerShell script that sends synthetic Spam/Phish/Malware emails via SMTP relay to EOP.
Your tenant's email domain (e.g. 'contoso.com' or 'contoso.onmicrosoft.com'). The SMTP endpoint is automatically derived as <domain-with-dashes>.mail.protection.outlook.com.
SMTP port. Use 25 for direct-to-MX (no auth) or 587 for SMTP submission (STARTTLS).
Comma-separated list of recipient email addresses. Replace with your tenant's mailboxes.
Number of emails each recipient should receive. The script sends in rounds of 5 random recipients until all have reached this count.
Percentage of emails that include a threat payload: GTUBE (spam), phishing URL, or EICAR (malware) attachment (0-100).
